---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for toolkit-data-contracts
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include CLI flags, output format, or API changes.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

How would you use this feature in your workflow? Example:

```bash
toolkit-contracts check --input data.jsonl --contract contract.json --new-flag value
```

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or screenshots.
